text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing up a training session with
Kawakami Princess...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wait right there, you big old moon!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The moon? Oh my! It's so big and round tonight!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It looks like a big, white dumpling, right? Looking
at it makes me want to chase after it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I used to do that when I was younger,
trying to imitate Princess Kaguya. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If I was really her, I could actually run to the
moon and back!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh! Now I've got the urge to run like wild! My
legs are just itching to go!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Then should we chase after the moon together?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's. ♪ Is it okay if I let loose a bit, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I think you've already done enough today.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's what I wanted to hear! Now then, I'm going
to blast ahead faster than a meteor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two racers spend the rest of the night chasing
after the moon, right up until curfew!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess it's not very princess-like to go
dashing off on impulse.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Aw, that's a shame. But this won't be the last full
moon we ever see, so we can always chase it next
time. ☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. We'll let it off the hook for now, but the
next time we meet, that moon's going down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two return to their dorm while the shining
moon watches silently from above.
